metadata.description: Agent Skills for SAP LeanIX — reusable, portable instructions that extend AI coding agents with LeanIX-specific workflows and domain knowledge.

plugins.name: automations-toolkit
plugins.description: Build, debug, and deploy LeanIX automation scripts. Covers trigger configuration, script templates, API deployment via MCP, error patterns, and multi-automation strategies.

plugins.name: fact-sheet-search
plugins.description: Search, discover, filter, and inspect LeanIX fact sheets using semantic search, name lookup, and structured filters.
